excerpt: I built a tool that polls HubSpot every 5 minutes, downloads call recordings, transcribes them with Deepgram, extracts BANT with GPT-4o, and pushes the insights back to the deal — fully automated. Here's how the pipeline works...

Most GTM engineers build pipelines. I build systems that understand why a deal stalled. DeepAccount — paste any company URL, get back ICP fit score, buyer personas, key objections, and an opening line. Ships in seconds.

The mistake most outbound teams make: they automate the sending but not the thinking. Pipeline AI takes a raw CSV and returns scored leads, personalised email sequences, and discovery call scripts with human review gates before anything goes out.
